title: INFORMATION SERVICES - 211info
text: CORVALLIS MULTICULTURAL LITERACY CENTER INFORMATION SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides English language assistance, tutoring, citizenship training and language reference materials, as well as a social environment for people from different cultures to connect and share. 2638 NW Jackson Avenue Corvallis, OR 97330 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Tuesday-Friday 10am-3pm Email (541) 632-3890 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main Phone (541) 632-3890 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in, call, or visit website for more information FEES: Varies by service; sliding scale available DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, Chinese, Korean, Vietnamese, Arabic, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Benton, Lincoln, and Linn Counties SITE HOURS: Tuesday-Friday 10am-3pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Free city bus stops within walking distance Services: Citizenship Education Cultural Heritage Groups English as a Second Language If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. CORVALLIS MULTICULTURAL LITERACY CENTER
